sphere 10.Bottom of the Well Invisible Chest: Bottom of the Well Key Ring

childAltar.hintText: 3 Spiritual Stones found in Hyrule...^$0Dodongo's Cavern...^$1Lake Hylia...^$2Lon Lon Ranch...^$iYe who may become a Hero...&Offer the spiritual stones and&play the Song of Time.

rewards.emeraldLoc: Dodongos Cavern MQ GS Song of Time Block Room

adultAltar.hintText: An awakening voice from the Sacred&Realm will call those destined to be&Sages, who dwell in the five temples.^$8The Graveyard...^$3Kokiri Forest...^$4Hyrule Field...^$5Water Temple...^$6Kakariko Village...^$7Death Mountain Crater...^$lThe awakened ones will await&for the Hero to collect&8 Spiritual Stones and Medallions.^$bAnd the %revil one%w's key will&be hidden somewhere %rinside&its castle%w.^$kTogether with the Hero of Time,&the awakened ones will return&the light of peace to the world...

ganonText: Many tricks are up my sleeve,&to save yourself&you'd better leave!
ganonHintText: Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me&by reflecting my lightning bolts&and unleashing the arrows from&Spirit Temple!
ganonHintLoc: Spirit Temple MQ Silver Block Hallway Chest
dampeText: Whoever reads this, please enter&%gGerudo Valley%w. I will let you&have my stretching, shrinking&keepsake.^I'm waiting for you.&--Dampé
